title: 🛡️ Sentinel: [Low] Fix false positive FIX comment and improve symlink handling
description:
🚨 Severity: Low
💡 Vulnerability: Broken symlinks were not correctly identified as existing lock files by `[[ -e $LOCK_DIR ]]`, falling through to an inaccurate error message.
🎯 Impact: Improved robustness of the lock acquisition mechanism to properly detect broken symlink locks and display accurate error messages.
🔧 Fix: Updated the existence check to `[[ -e $LOCK_DIR || -L $LOCK_DIR ]]` to cover broken symlinks and marked the Sentinel FIX comment as Fixed.
✅ Verification: Tested lock creation with regular files, broken symlinks, and directory symlinks, confirming that the script now consistently identifies them and prevents execution.
